action.content:
Name geometric shapes from their SVG paths.

Q: This SVG path element <path d="M 31.00,73.00 L 32.00,59.00 L 44.00,50.00 L 49.00,41.00 L 64.00,37.00 L 71.00,55.00 L 64.00,76.00 L 52.00,61.00 L 31.00,73.00"/> draws a
Options:
(A) circle
(B) heptagon
(C) hexagon
(D) kite
(E) line
(F) octagon
(G) pentagon
(H) rectangle
(I) sector
(J) triangle
A: (F)

Q: This SVG path element <path d="M 14.19,26.04 L 51.43,39.21 L 58.44,36.69 L 56.63,30.17 L 48.53,26.66 L 14.19,26.04"/> draws a
Options:
(A) circle
(B) heptagon
(C) hexagon
(D) kite
(E) line
(F) octagon
(G) pentagon
(H) rectangle
(I) sector
(J) triangle
A: (G)

Q: This SVG path element <path d="M 41.00,43.00 L 37.00,34.00 L 41.00,33.00 L 45.00,34.00 L 41.00,43.00"/> draws a
Options:
(A) circle
(B) heptagon
(C) hexagon
(D) kite
(E) line
(F) octagon
(G) pentagon
(H) rectangle
(I) sector
(J) triangle
A: (D)

Q: This SVG path element <path d="M 27.00,30.00 L 83.00,62.00 L 95.00,60.00 L 94.00,49.00 L 82.00,41.00 L 27.00,30.00"/> draws a
Options:
(A) circle
(B) heptagon
(C) hexagon
(D) kite
(E) line
(F) octagon
(G) pentagon
(H) rectangle
(I) sector
(J) triangle
A:
action.label: context

action.content:
To determine the geometric shape, let's count the number of vertices (points) in the provided SVG path:

Path: `M 27.00,30.00 L 83.00,62.00 L 95.00,60.00 L 94.00,49.00 L 82.00,41.00 L 27.00,30.00`

1.  **M 27.00,30.00** (Start point / Vertex 1)
2.  **L 83.00,62.00** (Vertex 2)
3.  **L 95.00,60.00** (Vertex 3)
4.  **L 94.00,49.00** (Vertex 4)
5.  **L 82.00,41.00** (Vertex 5)
6.  **L 27.00,30.00** (Back to start, closing the loop)

The path connects 5 distinct points to form a closed polygon. A polygon with 5 sides and 5 vertices is called a **pentagon**.

Comparing this to the options:
(A) circle - No
(B) heptagon - 7 sides
(C) hexagon - 6 sides
(D) kite - 4 sides
(E) line - 2 points
(F) octagon - 8 sides
(G) pentagon - 5 sides
(H) rectangle - 4 sides
(I) sector - Part of a circle
(J) triangle - 3 sides

The correct option is **(G)**.

A: (G)
action.label: response
